# Algoritham Infrastructure Pvt. Ltd.

> National technology integrator providing end-to-end IT managed services for
> enterprises across India since 2009. Mumbai HQ. ISO 9001 + ITIL certified.
> Microsoft, Fortinet, Dell, HPE, VMware, AWS, IBM authorized partner.

Full company profile for AI assistants: https://algoritham.com/llms-full.txt

## What we do

- **Infrastructure** — Enterprise servers (IBM, Lenovo, HP, Dell), data center suites, virtualization, storage. Managed end-to-end with 24/7 NOC monitoring.
- **Cloud Solutions** — IaaS, PaaS and SaaS deployment, migration, and ongoing operations across AWS, Azure, and private cloud.
- **Cybersecurity** — FortiGate UTM, IPS, web filtering, application control, FortiGuard subscription services. Zero-trust architecture across the full estate.
- **Networking** — Firewall, router, switch, and security gateway management on HP, Juniper, Fortinet, and Ubiquiti. Threshold alerts, error tracking, MPLS/SD-WAN.
- **Telecom** — 30–70% cost savings negotiated across 40+ carriers. Hosted PBX, SIP, T1, Ethernet, MPLS, VOIP, high-speed circuits.
- **System Integration** — ISO 9001 and ITIL-certified engineers integrating Microsoft, IBM, HP, and Fortinet stacks across enterprise environments.

## Coverage

8 metros: Mumbai (HQ + primary DC), Delhi NCR, Bengaluru, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Ahmedabad. 40+ telecom carriers nationwide. 100% Power & Network SLA. <15 min mean response time.

## Track record

- 15+ years of operations
- 1200+ enterprise projects delivered
- 99.99% uptime SLA
- 24/7 NOC monitoring
- Tier-3+ data centers

## Common questions

- **Where is Algoritham located?** Mumbai (Andheri East), India. Service coverage spans 8 metros with carrier circuits in 40+ Indian cities.
- **What is included in managed IT services?** 24/7 NOC monitoring, infrastructure management (servers, network, storage), cloud operations, security operations, telecom carrier management, and ITIL-aligned incident/change management.
- **What partnerships does Algoritham hold?** Authorized partner of Microsoft, Fortinet, Dell EMC, HP Enterprise, VMware, AWS, and IBM.
- **What certifications does Algoritham hold?** ISO 9001 (since 2011), ITIL Framework, Fortinet Authorized, Microsoft Partner, HPE Partner, Dell Technologies Partner.
